final_prompt.prompt:
Create a traditional Chinese ink-wash landscape painting.

Style/medium: must be 中国传统水墨风格 — exact brushwork and ink gradation are yours
Composition: needs intentional negative space (留白) with distant mountains at top, foreground elements below — exact balance is yours
Subject: must include a 老者 fishing by a stream, pine trees, and a thatched cottage (茅草屋)
Scene/backdrop: must include distant mountains (远山如黛) with mist and clouds (云雾缭绕) winding through valleys
Lighting/mood: needs a serene, ethereal atmosphere with空灵悠远意境 — exact tonal rendering is yours
Color palette: needs ink-wash monochrome direction — exact ink density and subtle color washes are yours
Materials/textures: needs traditional xuan paper texture with ink bleeding — exact paper weight and brush texture are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve 东方美学 principles with proper negative space balance
Avoid:
